leadership-num-11.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֶל־מֹשֶׁה אֶסְפָה־לִּי שִׁבְעִים אִישׁ מִזִּקְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֲשֶׁר יָדַעְתָּ כִּי־הֵם זִקְנֵי הָעָם וְשֹׁטְרָיו וְלָקַחְתָּ אֹתָם אֶל־אֹהֶל מוֹעֵד וְהִתְיַצְּבוּ שָׁם עִמָּךְ׃
leadership-num-11.englishText: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Gather unto Me seventy men of the elders of Israel, whom thou knowest to be the elders of the people, and officers over them; and bring them unto the tent of meeting, that they may stand there with thee.
leadership-num-11.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

leadership-exodus-3.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר מֹשֶׁה אֶל־הָאֱלֹהִים מִי אָנֹכִי כִּי אֵלֵךְ אֶל־פַּרְעֹה וְכִי אוֹצִיא אֶת־בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל מִמִּצְרָיִם׃
leadership-exodus-3.englishText: And Moses said unto God: ‘Who am I, that I should go unto Pharaoh, and that I should bring forth the children of Israel out of Egypt?’
leadership-exodus-3.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

courage-deut-31-6.originalText: חִזְקוּ וְאִמְצוּ אַל־תִּירְאוּ וְאַל־תַּעַרְצוּ מִפְּנֵיהֶם כִּי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ הוּא הַהֹלֵךְ עִמָּךְ לֹא יַרְפְּךָ וְלֹא יַעַזְבֶךָּ׃
courage-deut-31-6.englishText: Be strong and of good courage, fear not, nor be affrighted at them; for the LORD thy God, He it is that doth go with thee; He will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.’
courage-deut-31-6.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

courage-exodus-14-13.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר מֹשֶׁה אֶל־הָעָם אַל־תִּירָאוּ הִתְיַצְבוּ וּרְאוּ אֶת־יְשׁוּעַת יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲשֶׂה לָכֶם הַיּוֹם כִּי אֲשֶׁר רְאִיתֶם אֶת־מִצְרַיִם הַיּוֹם לֹא תֹסִיפוּ לִרְאֹתָם עוֹד עַד־עוֹלָם׃
courage-exodus-14-13.englishText: And Moses said unto the people: ‘Fear ye not, stand still, and see the salvation of the LORD, which He will work for you to-day; for whereas ye have seen the Egyptians to-day, ye shall see them again no more for ever.
courage-exodus-14-13.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

courage-num-13-20.originalText: וַיַּהַס כָּלֵב אֶת־הָעָם אֶל־מֹשֶׁה וַיֹּאמֶר עָלֹה נַעֲלֶה וְיָרַשְׁנוּ אֹתָהּ כִּי־יָכוֹל נוּכַל לָהּ׃
courage-num-13-20.englishText: And Caleb stilled the people toward Moses, and said: ‘We should go up at once, and possess it; for we are well able to overcome it.’
courage-num-13-20.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

gratitude-deut-8-10.originalText: וְאָכַלְתָּ וְשָׂבָעְתָּ וּבֵרַכְתָּ אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ עַל־הָאָרֶץ הַטֹּבָה אֲשֶׁר נָתַן־לָךְ׃
gratitude-deut-8-10.englishText: And thou shalt eat and be satisfied, and bless the LORD thy God for the good land which He hath given thee.
gratitude-deut-8-10.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

gratitude-exodus-15-1.originalText: אָז יָשִׁיר־מֹשֶׁה וּבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶת־הַשִּׁירָה הַזֹּאת לַיהוָה וַיֹּאמְרוּ לֵאמֹר אָשִׁירָה לַיהוָה כִּי־גָאֹה גָּאָה סוּס וְרֹכְבוֹ רָמָה בַיָּם׃
gratitude-exodus-15-1.englishText: Then sang Moses and the children of Israel this song unto the LORD, and spoke, saying: I will sing unto the LORD, for He is highly exalted; The horse and his rider hath He thrown into the sea.
gratitude-exodus-15-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

gratitude-lev-7-12.originalText: אִם עַל־תּוֹדָה יַקְרִיבֶנּוּ וְהִקְרִיב עַל־זֶבַח הַתּוֹדָה חַלּוֹת מַצּוֹת בְּלוּלֹת בַּשֶּׁמֶן וּרְקִיקֵי מַצּוֹת מְשֻׁחִים בַּשָּׁמֶן וְסֹלֶת מֻרְבֶּכֶת חַלֹּת בְּלוּלֹת בַּשָּׁמֶן׃
gratitude-lev-7-12.englishText: If he offer it for a thanksgiving, then he shall offer with the sacrifice of thanksgiving unleavened cakes mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers spread with oil, and cakes mingled with oil, of fine flour soaked.
gratitude-lev-7-12.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

gratitude-gen-24-27.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי אֲדֹנִי אַבְרָהָם אֲשֶׁר לֹא־עָזַב חַסְדּוֹ וַאֲמִתּוֹ מֵעִם אֲדֹנִי אָנֹכִי בַּדֶּרֶךְ נָחַנִי יְהוָה בֵּית אֲחֵי אֲדֹנִי׃
gratitude-gen-24-27.englishText: And he said: ‘Blessed be the LORD, the God of my master Abraham, who hath not forsaken His mercy and His truth toward my master; as for me, the LORD hath led me in the way to the house of my master’s brethren.’
gratitude-gen-24-27.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

community-exodus-19-6.originalText: וְאַתֶּם תִּהְיוּ־לִי מַמְלֶכֶת כֹּהֲנִים וְגוֹי קָדוֹשׁ אֵלֶּה הַדְּבָרִים אֲשֶׁר תְּדַבֵּר אֶל־בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
community-exodus-19-6.englishText: and ye shall be unto Me a kingdom of priests, and a holy nation. These are the words which thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel.’
community-exodus-19-6.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

community-num-11-10.originalText: וַיִּשְׁמַע מֹשֶׁה אֶת־הָעָם בֹּכֶה לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָיו אִישׁ לְפֶתַח אָהֳלוֹ וַיִּחַר־אַף יְהוָה מְאֹד וּבְעֵינֵי מֹשֶׁה רָע׃
community-num-11-10.englishText: And Moses heard the people weeping, family by family, every man at the door of his tent; and the anger of the LORD was kindled greatly; and Moses was displeased.
community-num-11-10.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

community-deut-31-12.originalText: הַקְהֵל אֶת־הָעָם הָאֲנָשִׁים וְהַנָּשִׁים וְהַטַּף וְגֵרְךָ אֲשֶׁר בִּשְׁעָרֶיךָ לְמַעַן יִשְׁמְעוּ וּלְמַעַן יִלְמְדוּ וְיָרְאוּ אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵיכֶם וְשָׁמְרוּ לַעֲשׂוֹת אֶת־כָּל־דִּבְרֵי הַתּוֹרָה הַזֹּאת׃
community-deut-31-12.englishText: Assemble the people, the men and the women and the little ones, and thy stranger that is within thy gates, that they may hear, and that they may learn, and fear the LORD your God, and observe to do all the words of this law;
community-deut-31-12.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

community-lev-25-35.originalText: וְכִי־יָמוּךְ אָחִיךָ וּמָטָה יָדוֹ עִמָּךְ וְהֶחֱזַקְתָּ בּוֹ גֵּר וְתוֹשָׁב וָחַי עִמָּךְ׃
community-lev-25-35.englishText: And if thy brother be waxen poor, and his means fail with thee; then thou shalt uphold him: as a stranger and a settler shall he live with thee.
community-lev-25-35.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

justice-exodus-23-6.englishText: Thou shalt not wrest the judgment of thy poor in his cause.
justice-exodus-23-6.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

justice-lev-19-15.originalText: לֹא־תַעֲשׂוּ עָוֶל בַּמִּשְׁפָּט לֹא־תִשָּׂא פְנֵי־דָל וְלֹא תֶהְדַּר פְּנֵי גָדוֹל בְּצֶדֶק תִּשְׁפֹּט עֲמִיתֶךָ׃
justice-lev-19-15.englishText: Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment; thou shalt not respect the person of the poor, nor favour the person of the mighty; but in righteousness shalt thou judge thy neighbour.
justice-lev-19-15.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

justice-deut-24-17.originalText: לֹא תַטֶּה מִשְׁפַּט גֵּר יָתוֹם וְלֹא תַחֲבֹל בֶּגֶד אַלְמָנָה׃
justice-deut-24-17.englishText: Thou shalt not pervert the justice due to the stranger, or to the fatherless; nor take the widow’s raiment to pledge.
justice-deut-24-17.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

justice-exodus-23-2.originalText: לֹא־תִהְיֶה אַחֲרֵי־רַבִּים לְרָעֹת וְלֹא־תַעֲנֶה עַל־רִב לִנְטֹת אַחֲרֵי רַבִּים לְהַטֹּת׃
justice-exodus-23-2.englishText: Thou shalt not follow a multitude to do evil; neither shalt thou bear witness in a cause to turn aside after a multitude to pervert justice;
justice-exodus-23-2.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

rest-gen-2-2.originalText: וַיְכַל אֱלֹהִים בַּיּוֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִי מְלַאכְתּוֹ אֲשֶׁר עָשָׂה וַיִּשְׁבֹּת בַּיּוֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִי מִכָּל־מְלַאכְתּוֹ אֲשֶׁר עָשָׂה׃
rest-gen-2-2.englishText: And on the seventh day God finished His work which He had made; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.
rest-gen-2-2.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

rest-exodus-23-12.originalText: שֵׁשֶׁת יָמִים תַּעֲשֶׂה מַעֲשֶׂיךָ וּבַיּוֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִי תִּשְׁבֹּת לְמַעַן יָנוּחַ שׁוֹרְךָ וַחֲמֹרֶךָ וְיִנָּפֵשׁ בֶּן־אֲמָתְךָ וְהַגֵּר׃
rest-exodus-23-12.englishText: Six days thou shalt do thy work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest; that thine ox and thine ass may have rest, and the son of thy handmaid, and the stranger, may be refreshed.
rest-exodus-23-12.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

rest-lev-25-4.originalText: וּבַשָּׁנָה הַשְּׁבִיעִת שַׁבַּת שַׁבָּתוֹן יִהְיֶה לָאָרֶץ שַׁבָּת לַיהוָה שָׂדְךָ לֹא תִזְרָע וְכַרְמְךָ לֹא תִזְמֹר׃
rest-lev-25-4.englishText: But in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a sabbath unto the LORD; thou shalt neither sow thy field, nor prune thy vineyard.
rest-lev-25-4.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

rest-deut-5-14.originalText: וְיוֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִי שַׁבָּת לַיהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ לֹא תַעֲשֶׂה כָל־מְלָאכָה אַתָּה וּבִנְךָ־וּבִתֶּךָ וְעַבְדְּךָ־וַאֲמָתֶךָ וְשׁוֹרְךָ וַחֲמֹרְךָ וְכָל־בְּהֶמְתֶּךָ וְגֵרְךָ אֲשֶׁר בִּשְׁעָרֶיךָ לְמַעַן יָנוּחַ עַבְדְּךָ וַאֲמָתְךָ כָּמוֹךָ׃
rest-deut-5-14.englishText: but the seventh day is a sabbath unto the LORD thy God, in it thou shalt not do any manner of work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, nor thy man-servant, nor thy maid-servant, nor thine ox, nor thine ass, nor any of thy cattle, nor thy stranger that is within thy gates; that thy man-servant and thy maid-servant may rest as well as thou.
rest-deut-5-14.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

speech-exodus-23-1.originalText: לֹא תִשָּׂא שֵׁמַע שָׁוְא אַל־תָּשֶׁת יָדְךָ עִם־רָשָׁע לִהְיֹת עֵד חָמָס׃
speech-exodus-23-1.englishText: Thou shalt not utter a false report; put not thy hand with the wicked to be an unrighteous witness.
speech-exodus-23-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

speech-deut-19-15.originalText: לֹא־יָקוּם עֵד אֶחָד בְּאִישׁ לְכָל־עָוֺן וּלְכָל־חַטָּאת בְּכָל־חֵטְא אֲשֶׁר יֶחֱטָא עַל־פִּי שְׁנֵי עֵדִים אוֹ עַל־פִּי שְׁלֹשָׁה־עֵדִים יָקוּם דָּבָר׃
speech-deut-19-15.englishText: One witness shall not rise up against a man for any iniquity, or for any sin, in any sin that he sinneth; at the mouth of two witnesses, or at the mouth of three witnesses, shall a matter be established.
speech-deut-19-15.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

speech-lev-19-11.originalText: לֹא תִּגְנֹבוּ וְלֹא־תְכַחֲשׁוּ וְלֹא־תְשַׁקְּרוּ אִישׁ בַּעֲמִיתוֹ׃
speech-lev-19-11.englishText: Ye shall not steal; neither shall ye deal falsely, nor lie one to another.
speech-lev-19-11.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

uncertainty-gen-12-1.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֶל־אַבְרָם לֶךְ־לְךָ מֵאַרְצְךָ וּמִמּוֹלַדְתְּךָ וּמִבֵּית אָבִיךָ אֶל־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר אַרְאֶךָּ׃
uncertainty-gen-12-1.englishText: Now the LORD said unto Abram: ‘Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto the land that I will show thee.
uncertainty-gen-12-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

uncertainty-exodus-16-4.originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֶל־מֹשֶׁה הִנְנִי מַמְטִיר לָכֶם לֶחֶם מִן־הַשָּׁמָיִם וְיָצָא הָעָם וְלָקְטוּ דְּבַר־יוֹם בְּיוֹמוֹ לְמַעַן אֲנַסֶּנּוּ הֲיֵלֵךְ בְּתוֹרָתִי אִם־לֹא׃
uncertainty-exodus-16-4.englishText: Then said the LORD unto Moses: ‘Behold, I will cause to rain bread from heaven for you; and the people shall go out and gather a day’s portion every day, that I may prove them, whether they will walk in My law, or not.
uncertainty-exodus-16-4.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

uncertainty-deut-29-28.originalText: הַנִּסְתָּרֹת לַיהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְהַנִּגְלֹת לָנוּ וּלְבָנֵינוּ עַד־עוֹלָם לַעֲשׂוֹת אֶת־כָּל־דִּבְרֵי הַתּוֹרָה הַזֹּאת׃
uncertainty-deut-29-28.englishText: The secret things belong unto the LORD our God; but the things that are revealed belong unto us and to our children for ever, that we may do all the words of this law.
uncertainty-deut-29-28.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

uncertainty-num-9-15.originalText: וּלְפִי הֵעָלֹת הֶעָנָן מֵעַל הָאֹהֶל וְאַחֲרֵי־כֵן יִסְעוּ בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וּבִמְקוֹם אֲשֶׁר יִשְׁכָּן־שָׁם הֶעָנָן שָׁם יַחֲנוּ בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
uncertainty-num-9-15.englishText: And whenever the cloud was taken up from over the Tent, then after that the children of Israel journeyed; and in the place where the cloud abode, there the children of Israel encamped.
uncertainty-num-9-15.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

learning-deut-6-7.originalText: וְשִׁנַּנְתָּם לְבָנֶיךָ וְדִבַּרְתָּ בָּם בְּשִׁבְתְּךָ בְּבֵיתֶךָ וּבְלֶכְתְּךָ בַדֶּרֶךְ וּבְשָׁכְבְּךָ וּבְקוּמֶךָ׃
learning-deut-6-7.englishText: and thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.
learning-deut-6-7.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

learning-deut-31-19.originalText: וְעַתָּה כִּתְבוּ לָכֶם אֶת־הַשִּׁירָה הַזֹּאת וְלַמְּדָהּ אֶת־בְּנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵל שִׂימָהּ בְּפִיהֶם לְמַעַן תִּהְיֶה־לִּי הַשִּׁירָה הַזֹּאת לְעֵד בִּבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
learning-deut-31-19.englishText: Now therefore write ye this song for you, and teach thou it the children of Israel; put it in their mouths, that this song may be a witness for Me against the children of Israel.
learning-deut-31-19.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

learning-exodus-13-8.originalText: וְהִגַּדְתָּ לְבִנְךָ בַּיּוֹם הַהוּא לֵאמֹר בַּעֲבוּר זֶה עָשָׂה יְהוָה לִי בְּצֵאתִי מִמִּצְרָיִם׃
learning-exodus-13-8.englishText: And thou shalt tell thy son in that day, saying: It is because of that which the LORD did for me when I came forth out of Egypt.
learning-exodus-13-8.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

generosity-lev-19-9.originalText: וּבְקֻצְרְכֶם אֶת־קְצִיר אַרְצְכֶם לֹא תְכַלֶּה פְּאַת שָׂדְךָ לִקְצֹר וְלֶקֶט קְצִירְךָ לֹא תְלַקֵּט׃
generosity-lev-19-9.englishText: And when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corner of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleaning of thy harvest.
generosity-lev-19-9.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

generosity-deut-14-28.originalText: מִקְצֵה שָׁלֹשׁ שָׁנִים תּוֹצִיא אֶת־כָּל־מַעְשַׂר תְּבוּאָתְךָ בַּשָּׁנָה הַהִוא וְהִנַּחְתָּ בִּשְׁעָרֶיךָ׃
generosity-deut-14-28.englishText: At the end of every three years, even in the same year, thou shalt bring forth all the tithe of thine increase, and shall lay it up within thy gates.
generosity-deut-14-28.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

generosity-exodus-25-2.originalText: דַּבֵּר אֶל־בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וְיִקְחוּ־לִי תְּרוּמָה מֵאֵת כָּל־אִישׁ אֲשֶׁר יִדְּבֶנּוּ לִבּוֹ תִּקְחוּ אֶת־תְּרוּמָתִי׃
generosity-exodus-25-2.englishText: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, that they take for Me an offering; of every man whose heart maketh him willing ye shall take My offering.
generosity-exodus-25-2.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

technology-exodus-31-1.englishText: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:
technology-exodus-31-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

technology-exodus-20-4.originalText: לֹא תַעֲשֶׂה־לְךָ פֶסֶל וְכָל־תְּמוּנָה אֲשֶׁר בַּשָּׁמַיִם מִמַּעַל וַאֲשֶׁר בָּאָרֶץ מִתַָּחַת וַאֲשֶׁר בַּמַּיִם מִתַּחַת לָאָרֶץ
technology-exodus-20-4.englishText: Thou shalt not make unto thee a graven image, nor any manner of likeness, of any thing that is in heaven above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth;
technology-exodus-20-4.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

technology-deut-27-18.originalText: אָרוּר מַשְׁגֶּה עִוֵּר בַּדָּרֶךְ וְאָמַר כָּל־הָעָם אָמֵן׃
technology-deut-27-18.englishText: Cursed be he that maketh the blind to go astray in the way. And all the people shall say: Amen.
technology-deut-27-18.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

technology-gen-11-4.originalText: וַיֹּאמְרוּ הָבָה נִבְנֶה־לָּנוּ עִיר וּמִגְדָּל וְרֹאשׁוֹ בַשָּׁמַיִם וְנַעֲשֶׂה־לָּנוּ שֵׁם פֶּן־נָפוּץ עַל־פְּנֵי כָל־הָאָרֶץ׃
technology-gen-11-4.englishText: And they said: ‘Come, let us build us a city, and a tower, with its top in heaven, and let us make us a name; lest we be scattered abroad upon the face of the whole earth.’
technology-gen-11-4.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

forgiveness-gen-50-17b.originalText: כֹּה־תֹאמְרוּ לְיוֹסֵף אָנָּא שָׂא נָא פֶּשַׁע אַחֶיךָ וְחַטָּאתָם כִּי־רָעָה גְמָלוּךָ וְעַתָּה שָׂא נָא לְפֶשַׁע עַבְדֵי אֱלֹהֵי אָבִיךָ וַיֵּבְךְּ יוֹסֵף בְּדַבְּרָם אֵלָיו׃
forgiveness-gen-50-17b.englishText: So shall ye say unto Joseph: Forgive, I pray thee now, the transgression of thy brethren, and their sin, for that they did unto thee evil. And now, we pray thee, forgive the transgression of the servants of the God of thy father.’ And Joseph wept when they spoke unto him.
forgiveness-gen-50-17b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

forgiveness-exodus-34-7.originalText: וַיַּעֲבֹר יְהוָה עַל־פָּנָיו וַיִּקְרָא יְהוָה יְהוָה אֵל רַחוּם וְחַנּוּן אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וְרַב־חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת
forgiveness-exodus-34-7.englishText: And the LORD passed by before him, and proclaimed: ‘The LORD, the LORD, God, merciful and gracious, long-suffering, and abundant in goodness and truth;
forgiveness-exodus-34-7.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

forgiveness-num-14-19.originalText: סְלַח־נָא לַעֲוֺן הָעָם הַזֶּה כְּגֹדֶל חַסְדֶּךָ וְכַאֲשֶׁר נָשָׂאתָה לָעָם הַזֶּה מִמִּצְרַיִם וְעַד־הֵנָּה׃
forgiveness-num-14-19.englishText: Pardon, I pray Thee, the iniquity of this people according unto the greatness of Thy lovingkindness, and according as Thou hast forgiven this people, from Egypt even until now.’
forgiveness-num-14-19.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

anger-gen-4-5.originalText: וְאֶל־קַיִן וְאֶל־מִנְחָתוֹ לֹא שָׁעָה וַיִּחַר לְקַיִן מְאֹד וַיִּפְּלוּ פָּנָיו׃
anger-gen-4-5.englishText: but unto Cain and to his offering He had not respect. And Cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.
anger-gen-4-5.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

anger-exodus-32-19.originalText: וַיְהִי כַּאֲשֶׁר קָרַב אֶל־הַמַּחֲנֶה וַיַּרְא אֶת־הָעֵגֶל וּמְחֹלֹת וַיִּחַר־אַף מֹשֶׁה וַיַּשְׁלֵךְ מידו [מִיָּדָיו] אֶת־הַלֻּחֹת וַיְשַׁבֵּר אֹתָם תַּחַת הָהָר׃
anger-exodus-32-19.englishText: And it came to pass, as soon as he came nigh unto the camp, that he saw the calf and the dancing; and Moses’anger waxed hot, and he cast the tables out of his hands, and broke them beneath the mount.
anger-exodus-32-19.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

anger-lev-19-18-grudge.originalText: לֹא־תִקֹּם וְלֹא־תִטֹּר אֶת־בְּנֵי עַמֶּךָ וְאָהַבְתָּ לְרֵעֲךָ כָּמוֹךָ אֲנִי יְהוָה׃
anger-lev-19-18-grudge.englishText: Thou shalt not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: I am the LORD.
anger-lev-19-18-grudge.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

humility-num-12-3b.originalText: וְהָאִישׁ מֹשֶׁה ענו [עָנָיו] מְאֹד מִכֹּל הָאָדָם אֲשֶׁר עַל־פְּנֵי הָאֲדָמָה׃
humility-num-12-3b.englishText: Now the man Moses was very meek, above all the men that were upon the face of the earth.—
humility-num-12-3b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

humility-deut-8-14.originalText: וְרָם לְבָבֶךָ וְשָׁכַחְתָּ אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ הַמּוֹצִיאֲךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים׃
humility-deut-8-14.englishText: then thy heart be lifted up, and thou forget the LORD thy God, who brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage;
humility-deut-8-14.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

humility-gen-18-27.originalText: וַיַּעַן אַבְרָהָם וַיֹּאמַר הִנֵּה־נָא הוֹאַלְתִּי לְדַבֵּר אֶל־אֲדֹנָי וְאָנֹכִי עָפָר וָאֵפֶר׃
humility-gen-18-27.englishText: And Abraham answered and said: ‘Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord, who am but dust and ashes.
humility-gen-18-27.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hospitality-gen-18-1.originalText: וַיֵּרָא אֵלָיו יְהוָה בְּאֵלֹנֵי מַמְרֵא וְהוּא יֹשֵׁב פֶּתַח־הָאֹהֶל כְּחֹם הַיּוֹם׃
hospitality-gen-18-1.englishText: And the LORD appeared unto him by the terebinths of Mamre, as he sat in the tent door in the heat of the day;
hospitality-gen-18-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hospitality-lev-19-34.originalText: כְּאֶזְרָח מִכֶּם יִהְיֶה לָכֶם הַגֵּר הַגָּר אִתְּכֶם וְאָהַבְתָּ לוֹ כָּמוֹךָ כִּי־גֵרִים הֱיִיתֶם בְּאֶרֶץ מִצְרָיִם אֲנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵיכֶם׃
hospitality-lev-19-34.englishText: The stranger that sojourneth with you shall be unto you as the home-born among you, and thou shalt love him as thyself; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
hospitality-lev-19-34.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hospitality-deut-10-19.originalText: וַאֲהַבְתֶּם אֶת־הַגֵּר כִּי־גֵרִים הֱיִיתֶם בְּאֶרֶץ מִצְרָיִם׃
hospitality-deut-10-19.englishText: Love ye therefore the stranger; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.
hospitality-deut-10-19.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

family-exodus-20-12.originalText: כַּבֵּד אֶת־אָבִיךָ וְאֶת־אִמֶּךָ לְמַעַן יַאֲרִכוּן יָמֶיךָ עַל הָאֲדָמָה אֲשֶׁר־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ נֹתֵן לָךְ׃
family-exodus-20-12.englishText: Honour thy father and thy mother, that thy days may be long upon the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.
family-exodus-20-12.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

family-gen-45-1.originalText: וְלֹא־יָכֹל יוֹסֵף לְהִתְאַפֵּק לְכֹל הַנִּצָּבִים עָלָיו וַיִּקְרָא הוֹצִיאוּ כָל־אִישׁ מֵעָלָי וְלֹא־עָמַד אִישׁ אִתּוֹ בְּהִתְוַדַּע יוֹסֵף אֶל־אֶחָיו׃
family-gen-45-1.englishText: Then Joseph could not refrain himself before all them that stood by him; and he cried: ‘Cause every man to go out from me.’ And there stood no man with him, while Joseph made himself known unto his brethren.
family-gen-45-1.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

family-deut-6-7b.originalText: וְשִׁנַּנְתָּם לְבָנֶיךָ וְדִבַּרְתָּ בָּם בְּשִׁבְתְּךָ בְּבֵיתֶךָ וּבְלֶכְתְּךָ בַדֶּרֶךְ וּבְשָׁכְבְּךָ וּבְקוּמֶךָ׃
family-deut-6-7b.englishText: and thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.
family-deut-6-7b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

work-exodus-20-9.englishText: Six days shalt thou labour, and do all thy work;
work-exodus-20-9.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

work-deut-24-14.originalText: לֹא־תַעֲשֹׁק שָׂכִיר עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן מֵאַחֶיךָ אוֹ מִגֵּרְךָ אֲשֶׁר בְּאַרְצְךָ בִּשְׁעָרֶיךָ׃
work-deut-24-14.englishText: Thou shalt not oppress a hired servant that is poor and needy, whether he be of thy brethren, or of thy strangers that are in thy land within thy gates.
work-deut-24-14.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

work-gen-2-15b.originalText: וַיִּקַּח יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאָדָם וַיַּנִּחֵהוּ בְגַן־עֵדֶן לְעָבְדָהּ וּלְשָׁמְרָהּ׃
work-gen-2-15b.englishText: And the LORD God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.
work-gen-2-15b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hope-gen-9-13.originalText: אֶת־קַשְׁתִּי נָתַתִּי בֶּעָנָן וְהָיְתָה לְאוֹת בְּרִית בֵּינִי וּבֵין הָאָרֶץ׃
hope-gen-9-13.englishText: I have set My bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between Me and the earth.
hope-gen-9-13.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hope-exodus-2-23.originalText: וַיְהִי בַיָּמִים הָרַבִּים הָהֵם וַיָּמָת מֶלֶךְ מִצְרַיִם וַיֵּאָנְחוּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵל מִן־הָעֲבֹדָה וַיִּזְעָקוּ וַתַּעַל שַׁוְעָתָם אֶל־הָאֱלֹהִים מִן־הָעֲבֹדָה׃
hope-exodus-2-23.englishText: And it came to pass in the course of those many days that the king of Egypt died; and the children of Israel sighed by reason of the bondage, and they cried, and their cry came up unto God by reason of the bondage.
hope-exodus-2-23.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

hope-deut-30-3.originalText: וְשָׁב יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֶת־שְׁבוּתְךָ וְרִחֲמֶךָ וְשָׁב וְקִבֶּצְךָ מִכָּל־הָעַמִּים אֲשֶׁר הֱפִיצְךָ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ שָׁמָּה׃
hope-deut-30-3.englishText: that then the LORD thy God will turn thy captivity, and have compassion upon thee, and will return and gather thee from all the peoples, whither the LORD thy God hath scattered thee.
hope-deut-30-3.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

truth-exodus-23-7.originalText: מִדְּבַר־שֶׁקֶר תִּרְחָק וְנָקִי וְצַדִּיק אַל־תַּהֲרֹג כִּי לֹא־אַצְדִּיק רָשָׁע׃
truth-exodus-23-7.englishText: Keep thee far from a false matter; and the innocent and righteous slay thou not; for I will not justify the wicked.
truth-exodus-23-7.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

truth-deut-16-20b.originalText: צֶדֶק צֶדֶק תִּרְדֹּף לְמַעַן תִּחְיֶה וְיָרַשְׁתָּ אֶת־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ נֹתֵן לָךְ׃
truth-deut-16-20b.englishText: Justice, justice shalt thou follow, that thou mayest live, and inherit the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.
truth-deut-16-20b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

truth-lev-19-11b.originalText: לֹא תִּגְנֹבוּ וְלֹא־תְכַחֲשׁוּ וְלֹא־תְשַׁקְּרוּ אִישׁ בַּעֲמִיתוֹ׃
truth-lev-19-11b.englishText: Ye shall not steal; neither shall ye deal falsely, nor lie one to another.
truth-lev-19-11b.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

joy-deut-16-14.originalText: וְשָׂמַחְתָּ בְּחַגֶּךָ אַתָּה וּבִנְךָ וּבִתֶּךָ וְעַבְדְּךָ וַאֲמָתֶךָ וְהַלֵּוִי וְהַגֵּר וְהַיָּתוֹם וְהָאַלְמָנָה אֲשֶׁר בִּשְׁעָרֶיךָ׃
joy-deut-16-14.englishText: And thou shalt rejoice in thy feast, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the Levite, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are within thy gates.
joy-deut-16-14.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

joy-deut-26-11.originalText: וְשָׂמַחְתָּ בְכָל־הַטּוֹב אֲשֶׁר נָתַן־לְךָ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ וּלְבֵיתֶךָ אַתָּה וְהַלֵּוִי וְהַגֵּר אֲשֶׁר בְּקִרְבֶּךָ׃
joy-deut-26-11.englishText: And thou shalt rejoice in all the good which the LORD thy God hath given unto thee, and unto thy house, thou, and the Levite, and the stranger that is in the midst of thee.
joy-deut-26-11.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

joy-exodus-15-20.originalText: וַתִּקַּח מִרְיָם הַנְּבִיאָה אֲחוֹת אַהֲרֹן אֶת־הַתֹּף בְּיָדָהּ וַתֵּצֶאןָ כָל־הַנָּשִׁים אַחֲרֶיהָ בְּתֻפִּים וּבִמְחֹלֹת׃
joy-exodus-15-20.englishText: And Miriam the prophetess, the sister of Aaron, took a timbrel in her hand; and all the women went out after her with timbrels and with dances.
joy-exodus-15-20.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

stewardship-gen-2-15c.originalText: וַיִּקַּח יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאָדָם וַיַּנִּחֵהוּ בְגַן־עֵדֶן לְעָבְדָהּ וּלְשָׁמְרָהּ׃
stewardship-gen-2-15c.englishText: And the LORD God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.
stewardship-gen-2-15c.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

stewardship-deut-20-19.originalText: כִּי־תָצוּר אֶל־עִיר יָמִים רַבִּים לְהִלָּחֵם עָלֶיהָ לְתָפְשָׂהּ לֹא־תַשְׁחִית אֶת־עֵצָהּ לִנְדֹּחַ עָלָיו גַּרְזֶן כִּי מִמֶּנּוּ תֹאכֵל וְאֹתוֹ לֹא תִכְרֹת כִּי הָאָדָם עֵץ הַשָּׂדֶה לָבֹא מִפָּנֶיךָ בַּמָּצוֹר׃
stewardship-deut-20-19.englishText: When thou shalt besiege a city a long time, in making war against it to take it, thou shalt not destroy the trees thereof by wielding an axe against them; for thou mayest eat of them, but thou shalt not cut them down; for is the tree of the field man, that it should be besieged of thee?
stewardship-deut-20-19.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

stewardship-deut-22-6.originalText: כִּי יִקָּרֵא קַן־צִפּוֹר לְפָנֶיךָ בַּדֶּרֶךְ בְּכָל־עֵץ אוֹ עַל־הָאָרֶץ אֶפְרֹחִים אוֹ בֵיצִים וְהָאֵם רֹבֶצֶת עַל־הָאֶפְרֹחִים אוֹ עַל־הַבֵּיצִים לֹא־תִקַּח הָאֵם עַל־הַבָּנִים׃
stewardship-deut-22-6.englishText: If a bird’s nest chance to be before thee in the way, in any tree or on the ground, with young ones or eggs, and the dam sitting upon the young, or upon the eggs, thou shalt not take the dam with the young;
stewardship-deut-22-6.englishEdition: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
